description: Style Note swiss army Altitude by Victorinox Swiss Army is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for men. With a strong presence, it's like a voyage in the mountains, air, clouds... You are in the mountains.. you see them, feel them, live in them. Clean. Cloudy, but, at the same time, heavy and grounded.Product DetailsTop notes are Virginia cedar and juniper berries while middle notes are sage and mint and base note is woodsyCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesQuantity100 ml
